title: Handing the burden back gently
subtitle: A visualisation for releasing inherited money grief without anger or erasure.
excerpt: A ten-minute visualisation for the moment you are ready to put down what you have been carrying for the women in your line. The image is an exchange: you return their burden with love, and they release you to go forward without it.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education, developed for the ancestral forgiveness theme of Day 12 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Draws on ancestral release visualisation techniques from the public-domain contemplative tradition.

content.text: A ten-minute visualisation for the moment you are ready to put down what you have carried for others. The exchange is gentle: you don't reject what they gave you. You return it to them and take back only what is yours.
Sit or lie down. Eyes closed. Three slow breaths.

Picture yourself standing in an open space, and in front of you is the woman from your line whose money pain you have been holding. She may look like your grandmother, your mother, or simply a figure you know is from your line.
You are holding something in your arms, the weight of her fear, her lack, her belief that it would always be hard. You have been carrying it without meaning to. You can feel the weight of it now.

See yourself stepping forward. You place what you are holding down on the ground between you and her. Not as rejection. As an act of love. You say to her, without words: "I see what you carried. I'm not able to carry it for you any longer. I release it back to where it belongs."

Watch her pick it up or let it dissolve. Whichever image comes is correct. Then watch her step back. She is not diminished. Her struggle was real and it is honoured. But it is no longer living in you.
Stand in the open space where you placed the burden down. Notice it is lighter. This is where you go forward from.
Open your eyes when you're ready.

Original to homemade.education. Written for the ancestral forgiveness theme in Day 12 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Ancestral release work draws on a long public tradition of quiet visualisation. This version is shaped for the inherited-grief pattern the program works with.
